theme_and_archetype.archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with E1 Twist (Neo-Brutalist contrast)
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The user requested a modern, clean look with baby blue and a colorful, vibrant aesthetic. Moving away from the dark/red grungy look to a fresh, premium, high-contrast light theme. Using Neo-Brutalist elements (sharp borders, offset shadows) keeps the baby blue from looking childish and maintains a premium, structured barbershop feel.

headings.styling: tracking-tight, never centered by default, strong personality.

color_palette.rules: Use Baby Blue (#38BDF8) as the primary brand color for large areas, headers, and highlights. Use vibrant Orange (#F97316) exclusively for 'BOOK NOW' and primary CTAs to make them pop. Text must be deep slate (#0F172A) for crisp APCA contrast. Surfaces feature crisp 2px borders (#0F172A) and offset shadows for that colorful neo-brutalist pop.

spacing_and_layout.system: Tailwind generous spacing: p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use Mode A 'Tetris Grid' for the Gallery and Services preview (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-8).
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_shadows: Neo-brutalist / Structural. Cards use solid white backgrounds, 2px solid slate-900 borders, and hard 4px offset drop-shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A]) to feel playful, colorful, and highly modern without being childish.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-first. Optical alignment. Left-align text blocks. Asymmetry preferred.

components.marketing_pages: Use pure HTML + Tailwind. No rigid Shadcn cards for the main marketing sections. Use raw divs to achieve overlapping and bento grids.
components.booking_modal: Use Shadcn Dialog, Form, Input, Select. Customize to remove 'Vercel-look'. Make inputs have 2px borders and solid focus states (focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary). Implement as a multi-step UI with progress indicator (Steps 1 to 4).
components.admin_dashboard: Use Shadcn Table, Tabs, Cards. Strict grid hierarchy, clean white surfaces with subtle 1px borders.
components.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. 'Kinetic Texture' style: text-6xl outline text (text-transparent [-webkit-text-stroke:2px_#0F172A]) on Baby Blue background.
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight) for a high-end modern feel. Install via yarn add @phosphor-icons/react.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons must have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0F172A] transition-all duration-200).
motion_and_interaction.scroll_animations: Staggered fade-up for bento grid items using framer-motion.
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus rings on all inputs.
motion_and_interaction.music_toggle: Sticky floating button (bottom-right), circular, glassmorphism or hard-shadow style, toggles background track.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over baby blue must be dark (#0F172A). Orange CTAs must use white text and meet 3:1 contrast for large text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='book-now-hero-btn', data-testid='service-card-1', data-testid='booking-modal-next-btn', data-testid='admin-login-submit'.

hero_backgrounds.description: Luxurious barber chairs and sinks in a dimly lit salon

team_and_services.description: a man cutting another mans hair with a pair of scissors

gallery.description: Profile view of a stylish South Asian man showcasing a modern haircut in a barbershop setting.
A man receives a haircut and trim in a professional barbershop setting with focus on style and detail.

page_specific_instructions.home_page: Hero: High impact, Baby Blue dominant overlay (bg-sky-400/80) on background image if needed, or pure CSS background. Huge text for 'TZOUL BARBER'. Next, a Marquee bar. Then Bento Grid for Services and Team previews. Gallery is an Instagram-style asymmetrical grid. Contact section at bottom. Include floating Music toggle button.
page_specific_instructions.booking_modal: Triggered by any 'Book Now' button. Overlay is Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-900/40). Modal itself is solid white, 2px border, hard shadow. Steps: 1. Service (grid of cards), 2. Barber (cards with photos), 3. Date/Time (Shadcn Calendar + time slots), 4. Details (Shadcn Form), 5. Confirmation (Success graphic/check).
page_specific_instructions.admin_dashboard: Clean, high-contrast utility. Sidebar navigation (Baby Blue background, dark text). Main area uses white cards for metric summaries and Shadcn Tables for Booking lists. Strict, organized, no playful offsets here.
page_specific_instructions.style_finder: Interactive quiz. One question per view using framer-motion slide transitions. 'What is your hair type?' -> 'What length?' -> 'Beard?' -> Recommends a service and barber.
